rows.notes: Header/carryover line. First word illegible (possibly 'Orinda' or similar). 'Brought over' is a standard ledger phrase indicating previous balance. No amounts attached to this structural label.
Clear handwriting. Amounts align well with vertical column lines. Shillings (5) and pence (10) both within valid range.
Abbreviated 'Ditto' indicating repeat of previous item. No pounds column filled; shillings (8) and pence (11) are clear and valid.

rows.description: Mr Kilsomer 18th Augt in 1857 Mds Gold 1863 1850

Clear entry name and clear amounts. All values well-aligned and valid (20£ 0s 0d).
